title: Better Nature
description: This mostly client side mod adds mushrooms to trees, insects, 3D leaves, new plants, and new animals compatible with vanilla clients
body:
# Better Nature

This mod is mostly a visual enhancement mod, but also has server side cosmetic features compatible with vanilla clients!

![A dragonfly flying](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/T1QVd6Ni/images/61afed4c7bf78ede9e453c73a9bb9882d72069b9.gif)

[Also available in a resource pack format](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/better-nature-vanilla-edition)
## Features when the mod is installed on both the client and server:

- 3D leaves
- New plants
- Mushrooms on trees
- Branches on trees
- New underwater plants
- Better cactus
- Pebbles on stones
- Actual leaves vines
- 2 new music discs, obtainable from creepers
- 3 new musics, one for the menu, one for badlands and one for frozen peaks
- Underwater particle for breathing
- New animal: the crab (compatible with vanilla client)
- Beetles
- Dragonflies

## Features of the mod when only installed on the client:

- 3D leaves
- New plants
- Mushrooms on trees
- New underwater plants
- Better cactus
- Pebbles
- Leaves on vines
-  3 new music, one for the menu, one for badlands and one for frozen peaks
- Beetles
- Dragonflies

## Features of the mod when installed on the server but not on the client:

- Underwater particle for breathing
- New animal: the crab (compatible with vanilla client)

### How to summon the crab in survival with the mod installed on the server:

- Use a name tag with the name << Crab >> and apply it to a turtle!

The crab will behave agressively, but doesn't drop anything

## Music credits
[Thirty Fangs](https://linktr.ee/thirtyfangs)
